title: crepis suffreniana subsp. apula
intro: Crepis suffreniana subsp. apula is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds. Traditionally, Crepis suffreniana subsp. apula has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote overall health and well-being.
